name: Ringmaster
flavor: The showman: a juggler who works the whole ring, turning heavy clubs and sheer spectacle into crowd control — every eye on him, whether they like it or not.

features.name: All Eyes On Me
features.description: You command attention like a spotlight. Once on each of your turns, when you hit a creature with an implement, you can forgo that implement's damage to instead rivet its attention on you: it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw against your {{Trick Shot DC|6 + proficiency bonus + Intelligence modifier}} or have disadvantage on any attack roll that doesn't include you as a target, until the start of your next turn. You can hold only one creature's attention this way at a time.

features.name: Grand Finale
features.description: Once per short or long rest, you can turn a Barrage into a showstopping set piece. Take the Attack action and throw implements as normal, then put on the show: each ally who can see you gains temporary hit points equal to your Juggler level, and each enemy within 15 feet of you must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw against your {{Trick Shot DC|6 + proficiency bonus + Intelligence modifier}} or be frightened of you until the end of its next turn. The crowd is yours.
